allow: Bash(else echo "[WARNING] Client not found - will run standalone audit")

Bash(python -c "import json; data = json.load(open(''.tmp/thedarenetwork_audit_crawl.json'')); print(''Pages crawled:'', len(data[''pages''])); print(''''); print(''Sample page data:''); page = data[''pages''][0]; print(f""URL: {page[''url'']}""); print(f""Title: {page.get(''title'', ''N/A'')}""); print(f""H1: {page.get(''h1'', ''N/A'')}""); print(f""Meta desc length: {len(page.get(''meta_description'', ''''))}""); print(f""Internal links: {page.get(''internal_links_count'', 0)}""); print(f""Schema types: {'', ''.join(page.get(''schema_types'', []))}"");")
